creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jkois       2011-03-08 17:55:46 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    en/support           webresources.sgml 
  Log:
  PR:     www/155369
  
  Remove the link to Darwin/OpenDarwin:
  - OpenDarwin has been closed down in 2006.
  - Apple has stopped providing binary install images for Darwin.
  - PureDarwin (which tried to follow up on OpenDarwin) has not been udpated in the last 15 months either.
  
  Pointed out by: Jason Helfman (jhelfman ett experts-exchange dott com)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +1 -5      www/en/support/webresources.sgml
